narrative:
Precinct Wapakoneta 2B (precinct in Auglaize County) has 751 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.5 percentage points.
